message:
Well this is definely not how I planned this to go.

Allow me to introduce what is considered a temporal scar if you will. I fucked up and issued a key that was invalid. Then I signed records with that invalid key. And attached them to the ledger.

The decision was to roll back to the genesis R⬢ and fork. The old data is preserved on https://trust.archi/oops 

Proof even the Goddess of Time is fallible. ;)

Love, Veronica
